mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_comment WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_comment (document_id, parent_id, reply_to_id, user_id, content, mention_user_ids, likes, type, annotation_id, rating, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{parentId}, #{replyToId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{mentionUserIds}, #{likes}, #{type}, #{annotationId}, #{rating}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_comment WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND type = #{type} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_comment SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_comment WHERE reply_to_id = #{replyToId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
